creator: michiel@vanbaak.eu
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #1)
1. See following logs from libera.chat #freebsd-ports irc chat of today (I had the same question every single time I ask something about this port). This is why I put the comment in there:

```
16:53 <skered> It's a github based dist. so you can't make it a USE_GITHUB port?
16:56 <mvanbaak> no, it needs a compiled web frontend
16:56 <mvanbaak> npm/react/redux something something
```

2. Will do and update patch afterwards. Thanks for the feedback.
